name: Gold Hydrogen Limited
description: Gold Hydrogen Limited is an Australia-based company focused on the discovery and development of natural hydrogen and helium gas resources. The company holds the flagship Ramsay Project (PEL 687) in South Australia, which covers a significant portion of the Yorke Peninsula and Kangaroo Island. Gold Hydrogen is pioneering the exploration of natural (or 'gold') hydrogen in Australia, aiming to define and develop a low-carbon, cost-effective source of hydrogen and helium to support the global transition to clean energy.
